scripts.run:all: node restoreHistory.js && cucumber-js && node saveHistory.js && node generateReport.js
scripts.run:name: node restoreHistory.js && cucumber-js --name "$npm_config_name" && node saveHistory.js && node generateReport.js
scripts.run:tag: node restoreHistory.js && cucumber-js --tags "$npm_config_tag" && node saveHistory.js && node generateReport.js
scripts.run:login: node restoreHistory.js && cucumber-js --tags @login-sucesso && node saveHistory.js && node generateReport.js
scripts.clean: rmdir /s /q allure-results & rmdir /s /q allure-report & rmdir /s /q allure-reports & rmdir /s /q allure-history & rmdir /s /q evidences
